# nullcloud_instance (Data Source)

Fetches a NullCloud virtual server instance by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nullcloud_instance" "example" {
  id = "vsi-abc123"
}

output "instance_ip" {
  value = data.nullcloud_instance.example.primary_ip
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the instance.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `image` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `primary_ip` (String)
- `profile` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `subnet_id` (String)
- `vpc_id` (String)
